items.reason: This user-facing dscli guide enumerates supported subcommands and command reference sections, but the PR adds dscli status without documenting it here.
The PR adds cli/status.py, but the generated repository index's cli file listing was not regenerated to include the new module.
The spec says dscli status MUST print a trailing total-count summary, but cli/status.py only prints the table rows and returns success.
The plan accurately records the implemented parser, registration, output table, and verification steps for the new dscli status command.
